headline: Assessing State Street (STT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why State Street Stock Is On Investors’ Radar State Street (STT) has drawn attention after recent share performance data showed a 2.1% gain over the past month and a 21.0% move in the past 3 months, prompting closer scrutiny of the stock’s fundamentals. See our latest analysis for State Street. At a share price of $153.95, State Street’s recent 90 day share price return of 21.0% and 1 year total shareholder return of 64.69% suggest momentum has been building, as investors reassess both growth...
